chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No. S - 137 of 2023 ( Muhammad Ramzan Arain Vs.Noor Muhammad & another) Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 26-02-2024. Mr. J.K Jarwar, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Safdar Ali Ujjan, Advocate for private respondent Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. >>>>>...<<<<< After arguing the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application at some length, it was stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the disposal of instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application for cancellation of bail to the private respondent before this Court on merits provided learned trial Court is directed to dispose of very case within three months after receipt of copy of this order, which is not opposed by learned Addl. PG for the State and learned counsel for the private respondent. Order accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
